series_metadata.series_description: This record series consists of original computer printouts (inventories) of all Ohio Department of Public Safety divisional entities (which includes Ohio Emergency Management Agency, Ohio Emergency Medical Services, Ohio Bureau of Motor Vehicles, Ohio State Highway Patrol, Ohio Investigative Unit, Ohio Homeland Security, Ohio Narcotics Intelligence Center, and Office of Criminal Justice Services) transfer documents (HP-74, DPS0116), emails and correspondence, salvage forms, physical inventory forms, DAS surplus and/or trade-in turn-in document form.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: Records listed in Records Series Description shall be kept in office five (5) years and ; Electronic: Records listed in Records Series Description shall be kept digitally a period of seven (7) years
